title: Jammy Eggs With Blistered Tomatoes & Pesto Lentils
summary: A tomato and pesto situation teamed with oh-so perfect jammy eggs. The perfect 6-ingredient recipe, great for meat eaters and vegetarians alike.

ingredients.label: 3 x 400g Packs of Cooked Puy Lentils
ingredients.name: Cooked Puy Lentils

ingredients.label: 3 x 400g Packs of Cooked Puy Lentils
ingredients.name: Lentil

method.description: Get a saucepan full of water to the boil. Add the whole cherry tomatoes into a frying pan on medium-high heat with 2 tbsps of olive oil. Cook until starting to char, 5-7 mins.
Meanwhile, peel and thinly slice the onion. Add them to the tomatoes and cook until softened, 4-6 mins.
Once the water is boiling, gently drop the eggs in and cook until soft boiled, 6-7 mins.
Once the onions have softened, stir through the spinach until wilted. Then add the lentils and ¾ of the pesto. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
Mix the remaining pesto with 20ml of olive oil. Peel and cut the eggs in half.
Share the lentils between your bowls, top with eggs and a drizzle of pesto.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
